reason: Verify the rewritten canary state machine still honors resource-ownership, evidence-gate, and progress-polling contracts, and that promote/rollback/cleanup own exactly the right per-canary resources.
This is a cross-layer change (invoke hot path + canary service + API + frontend) — check layer boundaries, the new invoke-routing payload/contract, and fail-safe behavior across layers.
Verify per-named-endpoint telemetry/online-eval log-group + service.name wiring so each variant's verdict reads the correct stream.
